title: gasteria × kewensis
intro: Gasteria × kewensis is a rare and hybrid succulent plant, resulting from the cross between Gasteria bicolor and Gasteria liliputana, both native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its unique foliage and medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities. The extracts of Gasteria × kewensis have been found to possess health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, Gasteria × kewensis is prepared as a powder or infused in water to be used in various remedies, often used to treat respiratory issues and wounds.
